command:
# Remove healer cron
crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep -v sakura-healer | crontab -
echo "HEALER_CRON: $(crontab -l 2>/dev/null | grep sakura || echo removed)"

# Remove healer script
rm -f /home/jose/sakura-healer.py /home/jose/sakura-healer.log
echo "HEALER_FILES: removed"

# Stop hermes on vm-hermes
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "sudo systemctl stop hermes-gateway; sudo systemctl disable hermes-gateway; echo HERMES_STOPPED"
